channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: PowerWash Simulator 2 DLC ‘Star Wars Pack’ launches July 16
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Blast the grime far far away.

PowerWash Simulator 2 downloadable content “Star Wars Pack” will launch on July 16 for $9.99 / £7.99 / €9.99, developer FuturLab announced.

Here is an overview of the downloadable content, via its Steam page:

Step into the Original Trilogy

Set during the events of Star Wars: A New Hope, Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back, and Star Wars: Return of the Jedi, take on the role of P0-W2, a Class Five cleaning droid. Your average assignment quickly spirals into being commandeered to carry out the Empire’s dirty work, before clearing the way for the Rebel Alliance. Rebellions are built on hope, and soap.

Custom Equipment for a More Civilized Age

Dirt is no match for a water blaster at your side, kid, and this one’s got enough force to remove even the grimiest globs of grease in the galaxy. Take aim at muck with a bespoke power washer, an elegant weapon for a more civilized—and soapy—age.

The Galaxy Awaits

Your mission takes you from the sandstorms of Tatooine to the ice fields of Hoth, with a smattering of stops along the Outer Rim. Get up close and personal with iconic Star Wars locations, ships, and droids like never before, uncovering every last detail as you blast away the dirt. There’s a whole galaxy out there—delight in cleaning it up.

Fly Solo or Form an Alliance

Follow your filth-fighting path alone or forge an alliance. Play through the campaign solo or team up to become the second most iconic droid duo in the galaxy. In Free Play, form an alliance with up to four faithful friends.

PowerWash Simulator 2 is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam, Epic Games Store, and Microsoft Store.

Watch a new trailer below.

DLC “Star Wars Pack” Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/powerwash-simulator-2-dlc-star-wars-pack-launches-july-16
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: 3D Metroidvania action adventure game DeadRoot announced for Xbox Series, PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Xbox Series

From Robots at Midnight developer Finish Line Games.

Robots at Midnight developer Finish Line Games has announced 3D Metroidvania action adventure game DeadRoot for Xbox Series and PC (Steam). A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Delve into a 3D Metroidvania world and uncover its secrets. Cut through hordes of foes and square off against colossal, screen-filling bosses. Every swing carries power and momentum in a ruthless, fast-paced combat experience. Sever limbs and trigger brutal executions. All the fun, none of the cleanup.

Key Features

  • Brutal Combat – You’re a small snail. Your foes are bigger, meaner, and out for blood. Flies swarm, rats stalk, and worse things wait deeper down. Impale the hardiest creatures. Finish them with bloody executions. Nature is brutal.
  • Learn and Gear Up – Friends and mentors will teach you new abilities and guide you on your path. Hunt down and acquire powerful weapons and armor. You’ll need every tool you find to traverse the world and solve its puzzles.
  • Explore and Reveal – Explore interconnected ruins and dungeons from a perspective you’ve never seen before. Squeeze into hidden paths, climb walls, and fire arrows at distant levers. Every obstacle you overcome pulls back another layer of a mysterious world.
  • Beneath the Roots – Venture through fallen kingdoms where nature is plunged into chaos. Whatever’s killing this world is waiting in the dark place, deep beneath the roots. In your hands you hold the one chance to restore balance.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/3d-metroidvania-action-adventure-game-deadroot-announced-for-xbox-series-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: The Road of Dust and Sorrow adds PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and Switch versions
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Cozy survival horror adventure game due out in 2026.

Cozy survival horror adventure game The Road of Dust and Sorrow will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and Switch alongside its previously announced PC (Steam) version in 2026, publisher Silver Lining Interactive and developed Painted Black Games announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Silver Lining Interactive:

About

Dive into a story-driven survival horror adventure inspired by classics like Resident Evil and Silent Hill. A cure designed to end famine became humanity’s ruin. The failed experiment twisted people into feral creatures called Dusters, driven by primal hunger. Katherine and her daughter Ava roam the remnants of civilization, searching for a safer future. Their journey draws the attention of a Preacher and his mysterious cult, driven by an ancient hunger, they see humans as fertile soil.

A Fallen World

Streets lie abandoned, buildings rot from the inside out, and vegetation is growing back at an accelerated rate. Traces of the past linger, in homes—barricaded for protection, offices with supplies scattered, and stores picked clean of supplies. Humanity is shaped by desperation, how far will you go to survive?

  • ❮
  • ❯

Fight for Your Life

Claw your way through decaying streets, bloodthirsty monsters, locked rooms, and forgotten corridors. Solve environmental puzzles, uncover hidden paths, and survive encounters with feral Dusters for a chance to reach safety. Proceed with caution every door can lead to salvation… or devastation.

Protect What Matters Most

Protect Ava at all cost. The world can die but she must live. Every step draws you deeper into a place that wants you gone. No one will save you, but you can fight. You can run. You can try to get her to safety.

Key Features

  • Story-driven linear gameplay.
  • Dystopian survival.
  • Exploration and puzzles.
  • Beautiful pixel art.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Consoles Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/the-road-of-dust-and-sorrow-adds-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-and-switch-versions
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Dark Deity III announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

The conclusion to the acclaimed strategy RPG trilogy.

Publisher indie.io and developer Sword & Axe have announced strategy RPG sequel Dark Deity III. It will be available for PC via Steam. A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Dark Deity returns with more strategy RPG goodness and adventure as the world of Terrazael faces its greatest threat yet.

The God of Death is coming, and time is running out. Death cults are spreading across the land, and only the Eternal Order stands between the world and total collapse. Lead two armies in a desperate race against time as they fight to uncover the truth and stop the coming storm. With a sweeping story that spans nations, continents, and even the afterlife itself, Dark Deity III brings a daring conclusion to the trilogy.

Two Armies, One War

Take control of Gwyn and Arthur Sildairan, heirs to the Eternal Order, as they lead two armies on converging paths in a war that spans worlds. Gwyn commands a military force to root out death cults across the living world, while Arthur leads a group of scholars into the afterlife to investigate the gods themselves.

Rally a cast of characters, both new and returning, as you fight on two fronts and lead these forces into a battle that will decide the fate of Terrazael.

Tactical Combat and Army Strategy

Engage in challenging grid-based tactical battles where positioning, abilities, and planning determine victory.

Use your units’ active abilities to:

  • Heal and sustain your forces.
  • Control the battlefield.
  • Break through enemy lines.
  • Accelerate your army’s growth.

Balancing unit progression with mission success is key and more rewarding than ever! Managing your army’s morale is just as critical as winning the battle itself. A confident force can push forward with strength, while a struggling army must rely on its most resilient fighters to hold the line.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Deep Unit Customization and Replayability

Build your armies any way you want in an unmatched strategy RPG sandbox with:

  • 28 playable units across approximately 35 chapters.
  • 74 playable classes with flexible class tiers and countless combinations.
  • Over 100 weapons.
  • Over 60 build-defining rings.

…and after you’ve tried them all, you can do it all again fresh as new with a built-in randomizer for character recruitment order, loot, abilities, passives, enemies, and more!

A Story Across Worlds

The fate of Terrazael hangs in the balance as two journeys unfold across worlds.

Experience a fully voiced story following Gwyn’s campaign and Arthur’s journey into the unknown, complete with custom in-game manga pages that bring the biggest moments to life.

With 28 playable units and dozens of NPCs, Dark Deity III is a grand journey through lands both mundane and bizarre, where every battle shapes your legacy. Make your mark in the ever-growing world of Terrazael.

Its future is in your hands.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/dark-deity-iii-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Solarpunk management game BioEden announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

PC version due out on September 3. Demo now available.

Publisher Focus Entertainment and developer Broken Arms Games have announced solarpunk management game BioEden. It will launch for PC via Steam on September 3, followed by PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and Switch 2 at a later date. A demo is available now for PC.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Step into a cozy management journey as a Keeper and bring life back to a world quietly waiting to be healed. Craft the perfect biome for dozens of wonderful animal species and use your ingenuity to restore your planet, one ecosystem at a time.

Home Sweet Dome

Welcome to BioEden, a cozy management game where you will build a self-sustaining network of structures, all working in harmony to bring extinct animals back to life. As a Keeper, you have been entrusted by the Cosmic Collective to bring life back to a planet quietly waiting to be healed. Every healing begins with a single step. This one is yours.

Manage With Care

Upon your arrival, search for debris sites scattered across the land, they are the foundation of your journey. Recycle them into resources, and use those to build the base of your network: a solar energy system to generate electricity, and a water system to distribute it across all your buildings. Connect them together, weave a network across the land, and manage the supply and demand for every structure you create.

But plan with care. Each addition to your planet consumes resources, draws on energy, and nudges pollution upward. Find the balance between creation, exploration, and restraint, to accomplish the very mission that brought you here.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Become a Force of Change

This world reached out, and you answered.

Recycle your buildings once they have served their purpose. Purify your planet’s lakes and rivers. Reclaim its forgotten ruins. Restore the soil, and watch as life slowly returns to a landscape that had almost given up. Transform this barren planet into a thriving eden, and leave no trace that you were ever there.

You are not just building a home. You are becoming a force of renewal.

Nurture the Extinct

On your planet, life is ready to return. Inside your dome, you’ll welcome back dozens of extraordinary species, each with its own needs. Gather DNA samples, place your cocoons, and carefully tend to the conditions each creature requires: temperature, humidity, and the right vegetation to make them feel truly at home. Meet their needs, and watch these gentle beings flourish.

Your Guild, Your Path

The Collective brings together five distinct Guilds, each with its own identity, abilities, and archetype. United by a shared goal, each Guild also pursues its own ambitions, shaped by its core purpose and values. Your choice of Guild defines how you approach your mission: the methods may differ, the philosophies may clash, but the planet needs healing all the same. Choose your path wisely.

Breathe It All in

In BioEden, you can take the time you need. No fail states, no pressure, just the quiet pull of discovery and the deep satisfaction of watching a world transform through your choices. Let the soft sounds of nature envelop you as you tend, wander, and watch your planet gently come back to life.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/solarpunk-management-game-bioeden-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Don’t Fret adds PS5 version, launches October 1
item.content:encoded:
About

Don’t Fret is a first person psychological mascot-horror puzzle game, where music and horror intertwine in ways never before seen by the indie gaming community. Navigate the hallways of Harmonic Heights as “Fret,” a young talented guitar who is in search of finding a way back home.

Meet Fret: The Living Instrument

Meet Fret, a sentient guitar trapped in a nightmare of music and madness. Navigate the decaying halls of Harmonic Heights, uncover its secrets, and confront the horrors in a music world.

A Stylized World of Sound and Fear

Step into the visually stunning world of Don’t Fret, where every instrument, hallway, and shadow is alive with purpose. The game’s bold art direction blends psychological horror with musical surrealism, creating an unforgettable atmosphere that sets it apart from every other indie horror title.

Explore a Massive, Musical World

Shattering the boundaries of traditional indie horror with an expansive world spanning dozens of handcrafted environments—from classrooms and underground tunnels, to outside courtyards, gondola rides, and more.

Every area in Harmonic Heights is designed to keep you engaged at every turn.

A Cinematic Narrative Experience

Don’t Fret delivers a story-driven horror experience that unfolds through audio logs, inspectable items, and cinematic cutscenes seamlessly woven into gameplay. Unravel a tale of exploitation, performance, and identity as you descend into the nightmare of Harmonic Heights.

The Guitar Tuner: Your Lifeline Hud

Your guitar tuner doubles as a diegetic HUD, displaying your health, stamina, and battery levels—and even detecting nearby enemies through sound. As you progress, upgrade your tuner with new abilities to aid you on your journey.

Adaptive Enemy Encounters

Every encounter in Don’t Fret demands creativity. Some enemies are drawn to sound and movement, forcing you to be stealthy. Others are relentless, fast, and unpredictable, attacking from any angle. And some cannot be fought at all. You’ll need to observe, listen, and adapt to survive.

Musical Puzzles and Interactive Instruments

Music is more than atmosphere—it’s the key. Don’t Fret features a range of instrument-based puzzles, from pianos to percussive drum riddles, to guitars and harps. At the center is the G-PAD, a guitar-inspired lock mechanism requiring you to perform under pressure at every turn.

A World Scored by Rockit Music

Composed by Russell McKamey of Rockit Music, the soundtrack fuses cinematic orchestration with industrial horror. The soundtrack reacts to gameplay, evolving dynamically as you explore, hide, or fight—making sound itself part of the fear. The world of Don’t Fret, and the music is created by Rockit of Rockit Music. As pioneers in the Nerdcore music genre, they stand at the forefront, boasting an impressive record of over 400 million views and a thriving community of over one million subscribers on YouTube. Their expertise lies in crafting immersive soundscapes inspired by indie horror and pop culture, ensuring an electrifying auditory experience for enthusiasts and casual listeners alike.

Don’t Fret is truly one-of-a-kind adventure that you can’t miss!

Watch a new trailer below.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/dont-fret-adds-ps5-version-launches-october-1
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Aniimo launches in Q3 2026
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Global closed beta test set for this summer.

Free-to-play open-world creature catching action RPG Aniimo will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PC via Steam, Epic Games Store, and Microsoft Store, and iOS and Android in Q3 2026, publisher Kingsglory and developer Pawprint Studio announced.

A global closed beta test will take place this summer across PC, including Steam, iOS, and Android. Sign-ups are available now via the game’s official website.

The global closed beta will feature the following key features and new content:

  • Explore Aniimo’s expansive open world 
    • Pathfinders that twine with their Aniimo can battle, move, and explore the world of Idyll through the unique lens of the Aniimo they have twined with.
    • Players who twine can immerse themselves in the Aniimo society – experiencing everyday exchanges and habits that the Aniimo have developed amongst themselves.
  • New Aniimo
    • New Aniimo introduced include Bubbeep, Popapus, Mophling, and Sausite.
  • New Aniimo forms 
    • Pathfinders can encounter new Aniimo forms including Budsquire, Thornblade, and more.
  • New features in Astra 
    • Pathfinders can now access certain stores to purchase new accessories.
    • New decorative buildings have been implemented including a blind box and clothing store.
  • Home-building
    • The Homeland, which can be accessed via players’ RV moving base, will now feature more customization options and Aniimo-themed decorations.
  • New region 
    • A new water themed region, the Island of Peace, will be accessible for the first time.
  • Player-Versus-Player and Cooperative gameplay
    • Diamond Egg Heist (Player-Versus-Player)
      • Up to six teams of three Pathfinders compete to be the first to twine with the diamond egg. Once a player twines with the egg, cooperation will be key to victory as the other team members protect and safely escort the egg to safety.
    • Pathfinders can team up and take on the new boss challenges that await them: Bubbask and Coraliz.
  • Aniimo exchange
    • Pathfinders now have the ability to exchange Aniimo with each other.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Global Closed Beta Trailer

English

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/aniimo-launches-in-q3-2026
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: 2.5D Metroidvania game Gemini X announced for PC – inspired by 32-bit run-and-gun platformers
item.content:encoded:
Toronto-based studio Komi Games has announced Gemini X, a 2.5D Metroidvania “built for fans of classic 32-bit run-and-gun platformers.” It will be available for PC via Steam. A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Gemini X is a 2.5D Metroidvania set aboard a hijacked human space colony. Chart your own path through Z.C.N. 02, take on bosses in any order and shape the fate of characters you encounter. The world changes based on what you learn, what you choose, and how far you’re willing to go to save humanity.

Wrapped in a vibrant stylized art style, bursting with personality and driven by a synth-and-hard-rock soundtrack soaked in PS1-era DNA, Gemini X delivers the comfort of a classic feel in a modern package.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Key Features

  • Meet the Heretechs
    • A rogue faction of robotic freedom fighters, The Heretechs, have seized a space colony and taken its crew hostage.
    • Take back the colony, by meeting these powerful enemies head on, and obtain their unique powers throughout your adventure.
  • Make Them Go All-Out!
    • Discover secret ways to progress and alter the fights against the Heretechs. Make the right moves and you can force the boss to go ALL-OUT!
  • Foil Their Schemes
    • Be the thorn in their side as you sneak through Gemini station and work to unravel the Heretechs’ evil plot.
    • Take them out, sow dissent and drive them mad!
  • Rise of a Hero
    • Rook is a newly minted C.A.S.T.L.E. security officer, ambushed and left for dead when the Heretechs attack Z.C.N. 02.
    • In the wrong place at the wrong time, Rook now sets out to fight back against the Heretechs and regain control of the colony for good.
  • Jump ‘n Shoot, Man!
    • Dash, jump and shoot your way through the occupied Gemini Colony with fluid & responsive run-and-gun gameplay.
    • With every new synthesized power, you can discover new and intuitive ways to navigate and fight through Z.C.N 02.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery. Visit the official website here.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/2-5d-metroidvania-game-gemini-x-announced-for-pc-inspired-by-32-bit-run-and-gun-platformers
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Vampire Survivors DLC ‘Legacy of the Bloodmoon’ announced alongside ‘Survivaton’ label
item.content:encoded:
poncle has announced Vampire Survivors downloadable content “Legacy of the Bloodmoon.” It will launch this summer.

The studio also announced “Survivaton,” a new label for its growing lineup of Survivors-based projects, released a free content update for Vampire Survivors, and officially announced the new Japan studio led by Sawaki Takeyasu first revealed in a Weekly Famitsu interview earlier this week.

Vampire Survivors will be renamed Vampire Survivors: First Surivaton as part of the new label’s launch, and a Switch 2 version is currently in production.

Here are the details:

“Survivaton” and Vampire Survivors: First Survivaton

“Survivaton” is the name of poncle’s new lineup of Survivors-like projects. Short for “survive a ton,” the label encompasses internally developed games that build on the foundation of the studio’s flagship title, Vampire Survivors, in collaboration with selected content partners. Each project will aim to introduce major gameplay changes, content expansions, or genre twists exploring ideas substantial enough to stand as their own games.

The “Survivaton” initiative will serve as poncle’s umbrella for future survivors-like releases, and reflecting its place as the foundation of the series, Vampire Survivors will also be renamed to Vampire Survivors: First Survivaton.

To celebrate this new chapter, the game is releasing its free Patch 1.15 update on Steam today, featuring a new stage, new characters, new weapons, and new Darkanas. Patch 1.15 will be released on all other platforms a bit later, by the end of the month, due to platform-specific optimizations and differences in save slots management. On the bright side, we will also be releasing a Nintendo Switch 2 version, with better performance and mouse support!

Players looking for more information on the series can visit poncleup.com.

Vampire Survivors Expansion Pack “Legacy of the Bloodmoon”

Off the heels of its name change, Vampire Survivors: First Survivaton will also be getting a long-awaited expansion pack, “Legacy of the Bloodmoon.” The “evil twin” to the game’s first-ever expansion pack “Legacy of the Moonspell” and expected this summer across PC, Xbox, PlayStation, Nintendo Switch, and mobile platforms, “Legacy of the Bloodmoon” will include a substantial 10 new characters, more than 16 weapons and evolutions, a new XL stage, and eight new music tracks. As part of this release, poncle will expand “Legacy of the Moonspell” with additional content and permanently reduce its price, ensuring both it and Legacy of the Bloodmoon deliver a similarly substantial experience.

poncle Japan

To further support its growing global ambitions, poncle is establishing poncle Japan, a dedicated Japanese subsidiary focused on deepening the studio’s presence in one of the world’s most important gaming markets.

Headed by Sawaki Takeyasu, poncle Japan will oversee local development initiatives and strategic partnerships across the region. The team will serve as a bridge between poncle’s global operations and Japanese players, creators, and industry partners, ensuring the studio’s games and initiatives resonate with local audiences while helping identify new opportunities for growth and collaboration.

Vampire Survivors: First Survivaton is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, PC via Steam and Epic Games Store, iOS, and Android.

Watch a new set of trailers below.

DLC “Legacy of the Bloodmoon” Announce Trailer

Version 1.15 Update “The Lycaeum” Launch Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/vampire-survivors-dlc-legacy-of-the-bloodmoon-announced-alongside-survivaton-label
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Teeto adds Switch 2 version, launches July 15
item.content:encoded:
3D platformer Teeto will launch for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam on July 15, publisher Super Rare Originals and developer Eat Pant Games announced. The Switch 2 version is newly announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Super Rare Originals:

About

Teeto and Nory are going on an action packed adventure! Absorb ordinary objects from the world and harness their powers to fight the shadow corruption and assist a quirky cast of characters in a bright and colorful world.

Key Features

  • Absorb and Transform – Teeto’s got a talent for absorbing all sorts of objects and turning them into wild new forms! Unlock unique abilities to outsmart enemies, solve puzzles, and discover hidden secrets.
  • Team Up Together – Life’s better with a buddy and so is saving the world! Grab a friend and dive into split-screen cooperative play, where you’ll absorb, transform, and explore together.
  • Chaos Corruption – Chaos is spreading, and the shadow creatures are behind it! Teeto and Nory must use their unique powers to keep the world from tipping into complete disorder!
  • Missing Michaels – It started with Nory’s first experiment, Michael. But Michael couldn’t stop multiplying and now there are too many Michaels for anyone to handle! Track them down, rescue them, and bring the tiny mischief-makers home.
  • Lend a Hand – Teeto and Nory aren’t the only ones in need of help. Along the way, you’ll meet a colorful cast of quirky characters, each with their own oddball dilemmas!
  • Dress the Part – Teeto’s got a wardrobe full of wild unlockable outfits, from stylish to downright ridiculous. Saving the world is important, but looking good while doing it is just as crucial.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/teeto-adds-switch-2-version-launches-july-15
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Expeditions: Samurai announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
About

The sun rises on another civil war, as you land in Japan aboard a battered Dutch ship. Thrust into command of its motley crew, you must navigate the politics of Sengoku-era Japan using stealth, diplomacy, or violence in this party-based RPG where every choice matters.

Choose Your Path Through History

Expeditions: Samurai is an expansive roleplaying game set in our world during real historical events, with an intricate, branching story and a vibrant cast of characters. At every turn, you will be faced with life-or-death choices that will challenge your resolve.

Create the character you want to be and choose your own path through history. Even the smallest of your decisions can have far-reaching consequences for yourself, your crew, and—in many cases—the people of Japan.

Step into the Shoes of the First European Samurai

In the year 1600, the navigator William Adams arrived in Japan. He would soon become the first European granted the title of “Samurai”.

In Expeditions: Samurai, William Adams never leaves England; you will beat Adams to the punch and sail to Japan aboard the Dutch frigate De Albatros.

You arrive in Japan as the newly elected leader of a motley crew of privateers and are quickly swept up in an ongoing civil war that is nearing its climax. Navigate the politics, intrigue, and drama of feudal Japan as you and your crew catch the attention of powerful warlords whose struggle will determine the future of the nation.

Eight Companions, Eight Stories

Every crewmate has their own story to uncover—if you manage to earn their trust. Build your relationship with each companion into a meaningful friendship, a lifelong rivalry, or possibly even a new love.

Dynamic and Fast-Paced, Turn-Based Combat

Outnumbered but never outgunned, engage your enemies on your own terms in a fast and freeing turn-based combat system where movement, attacks, and interruptions can all play out simultaneously.

Use stealth and clever gadgets to toy with your opponents. Split up your team to position them in real-time and set up devastating ambushes. Utilize a vast array of weapons and abilities to maintain the upper hand—from mainstays of the pirate arsenal to iconic Japanese weapons.

Craft your own items and experiment with different loadouts to survive deadly and diverse enemies.

Invite a Friend in Cooperative Play or Play Alone

For the first time ever in an Expeditions game, experience the tense combat and deeply branching narrative of Expeditions: Samurai in drop-in / drop-out cooperative play. Play in single-player as your own Captain Flynn, or invite your friend and play as a pair of twins.

In cooperative play, talking to characters at the same time lets you wrestle for control of important decisions or compete for a companion’s affections. Coordinate sneak attacks or clever combat maneuvers; throw a distracting firecracker at just the right time to let your partner sneak past a sentry, or execute a flawlessly timed double stealth takedown.

Watch the announcement trailer below.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/expeditions-samurai-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
